Growster Design System v1.0

The Growster
Brand Book.

This document defines the complete design language for Growster — covering colors, typography, spacing, components, motion, and voice. Use it to brief designers, developers, or AI tools.

Primary Font
Montserrat
Base Color
#050508
Brand Color
#ff0080
Border Radius
99px (pills)
Design Mode
Dark only
Personality
Bold, sharp, human
Color System

Colors

All colors are designed for dark backgrounds only. Never use on white or light surfaces.

Brand Pink
#ff0080
Primary CTA, highlights, active states
Brand Blue
#0050ff
Secondary accent, gradients
Brand Purple
#8b5cf6
Tertiary accent, charts
Dark Pink
#cc0055
Hover states, button gradients
Background
#050508
Page background
Surface
rgba(255,255,255,0.04)
Cards, modals, glass panels
Border
rgba(255,255,255,0.08)
Dividers, card borders
Text Primary
#ffffff
Headlines, important text
Text Secondary
rgba(255,255,255,0.55)
Body text, descriptions
Text Muted
rgba(255,255,255,0.28)
Labels, placeholders, captions
Success
#10b981
Approved, done, positive states
Warning
#f59e0b
Pending, in-progress states
Error
#dc2626
Rejected, overdue, destructive

Gradients

Primary Gradient
linear-gradient(135deg, #ff0080, #0050ff)
Hero text, avatars, key CTAs
Pink Gradient
linear-gradient(135deg, #ff0080, #cc0055)
Primary buttons, FABs
Orb Pink
radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,0,128,0.18) 0%, transparent 70%)
Background orbs top-left
Orb Blue
radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,80,255,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%)
Background orbs bottom-right
Orb Purple
radial-gradient(circle, rgba(139,92,246,0.1) 0%, transparent 70%)
Background orbs center
Typography

Typography

Primary Typeface
Montserrat
Google Fonts — weights: 300, 400, 500, 600, 700, 800, 900
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap')
Display
64px / 900
Growster.
Hero headlines only
H1
40px / 800
Growster.
Page titles
H2
28px / 800
Growster.
Section headings
H3
20px / 700
Growster.
Card titles, subsections
Body Large
17px / 500
Growster.
Hero subtext, key descriptions
Body
14px / 400
Growster.
General body copy
Small
13px / 500
Growster.
UI text, buttons, nav
Label
11px / 700
Growster.
Form labels, pill text, captions — UPPERCASE
Micro
10px / 700
Growster.
Section tags, badges — UPPERCASE
Spacing & Layout

Spacing & Layout

Spacing Scale

4px
Icon gaps, tight inline spacing
8px
Small gaps, badge padding
12px
Button padding (sm), card gaps
16px
Standard gap, mobile padding
20px
Card padding (sm)
24px
Section padding (mobile), card padding
32px
Large card padding
48px
Section spacing (mobile)
64px
Section spacing (mobile alt)
120px
Section spacing (desktop)

Border Radius

Button / Pill
99px
All buttons, badges, tags
Card Large
28px
Hero cards, feature cards
Card
20px
Standard cards, modals
Card Small
16px
Compact cards, list items
Input
12px
All form inputs
Micro
8px
Small buttons, chips
UI Components

Components

Primary Button

Specs
background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff0080, #cc0055) border-radius: 99px padding: 10px 20px font-size: 13px font-weight: 700 box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,0,128,0.3) hover: translateY(-2px), shadow intensifies
Preview

Ghost Button

Specs
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05) border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1) border-radius: 99px color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7) hover: background lightens, border brightens
Preview

Glass Card

Specs
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03) border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08) border-radius: 20px backdrop-filter: blur(20px) hover: border brightens to 0.15
Preview
Glass card component

Pill Label

Specs
font-size: 10px font-weight: 700 letter-spacing: 0.15em text-transform: UPPERCASE color: #ff0080 background: rgba(255,0,128,0.1) border: 1px solid rgba(255,0,128,0.2) border-radius: 99px padding: 4px 12px
Preview
Our Services

Badge — Open

Specs
background: rgba(0,80,255,0.15) color: #60a5fa border: 1px solid rgba(0,80,255,0.25) border-radius: 99px font-size: 11px, weight 600, UPPERCASE
Preview
Open

Input Field

Specs
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05) border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08) border-radius: 12px padding: 10px 14px font-size: 14px focus: border rgba(255,0,128,0.5), glow rgba(255,0,128,0.1)
Preview
Icons & Emoji

Icons & Emoji

Growster uses system emoji as UI icons — no icon library. Emoji add personality and reduce visual weight. Use sparingly and purposefully.

🐹
Growster mascot, playful moments, 404 page
🎬
Directors, video production, shoots
📋
Tasks, references, lists
📊
Dashboard, analytics, reports
💰
Finance, revenue, money
💳
Payments, CC transactions
📈
Performance, growth, ROAS
✅
Approvals, completed, done
⚠️
Warnings, overdue, attention needed
🎯
Influencers, targeting, goals
🌐
Website leads, web-related
🔔
Notifications, standup alerts
✈️
Leave requests, travel
🗓
Attendance, calendar, scheduling
😤
Manager (intentionally expressive)
🚀
Excellent performance, scaling up
💪
Strong results, good progress
🔒
Locked references, security
Motion

Motion & Animation

Motion is purposeful and smooth. Use spring-like easing (cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)) for all UI transitions. Never use linear for UI — only for scrollbars and progress.

Fade Up
translateY(16px) → 0, opacity 0→1
0.5s
Page sections on scroll
Button Hover
translateY(-2px), shadow intensify
0.2s
All primary buttons
Card Hover
translateY(-3px), border brighten
0.3s
Feature cards, team cards
Glow Pulse
opacity 0.5→1→0.5
2s
Brand dot in hero pill
Overlay Open
backdrop-filter blur(8px)
0.2s
All modal overlays
Tab Indicator
border-bottom color transition
0.15s
Navigation tabs
Standard easing
cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)
/* Spring-like, fast start, smooth settle */
Brand Voice

Voice & Tone

Confident, not arrogant
""We build systems." not "We try to build systems.""
Direct, not corporate
""Let's talk →" not "Contact Us Today""
Specific, not vague
""3,000+ creatives delivered" not "Many creatives""
Human, not robotic
""Your daily survival tool 🐹" not "Task Management System""
Playful in micro-copy
"Fun facts, 404 page, empty states — use personality"
Sharp in headlines
"Max 6 words. No filler. Punch first."
Usage Rules

Do / Don't

✓ Do
✓Use Montserrat exclusively across all digital touchpoints
✓Always use the dark background (#050508) as base
✓Gradient text only on display/hero headlines
✓Pink (#ff0080) for primary actions only — one per screen
✓Glass cards with backdrop-filter: blur(20px)
✓Pill/rounded (99px) for all interactive buttons
✓Uppercase + wide tracking for all labels and section tags
✓Orb backgrounds on every major page/section
✓White text on dark — never dark text on dark
✓Emoji in UI for personality — sparingly, purposefully
✕ Don't
✕Never use light mode or white backgrounds
✕Never use system fonts — Montserrat only
✕Never use square buttons — always pill or rounded
✕Never use green (#059669) as brand — that's old
✕Never use solid black — use #050508
✕Never gradient on body text — headlines only
✕Never more than one primary CTA per section
✕Never use blue links underlined — style as pink accent
✕Never stack multiple gradient backgrounds
✕Never use emojis in headlines — micro-copy only
📋 AI Brief — Copy & Paste
Design in the Growster design language: - Dark background: #050508 (never white or light) - Font: Montserrat only (900 for headlines, 700 for subheads, 500 for body) - Primary color: #ff0080 (pink) — one accent per screen max - Secondary: #0050ff (blue) — for gradients and secondary elements - All buttons: pill-shaped (border-radius: 99px) - Cards: glass effect — rgba(255,255,255,0.04) bg, rgba(255,255,255,0.08) border, blur(20px) - Background: 3 gradient orbs (pink top-left, blue bottom-right, purple center-right) - Headlines: gradient text using linear-gradient(135deg, #ff0080, #0050ff) - Labels/tags: 10px, 700 weight, UPPERCASE, 0.15em letter-spacing - Motion: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) — spring easing - Personality: Bold, sharp, human. No corporate language. - Emoji: system emoji as icons, sparingly
Growster Brand Book v1.0 · 2026
